resources.string: Moonlight is testing your network connection to determine if any required ports are blocked.\n\nThis may take a few seconds…

Your network does not appear to be blocking Moonlight. If you still have trouble connecting, check your PC\'s firewall settings.\n\nIf you are trying to stream over the Internet, install the Moonlight Internet Hosting Tool on your PC and run the included Internet Streaming Tester to check your PC\'s Internet connection.
The network test could not be performed because none of Moonlight\'s connection testing servers were reachable. Check your Internet connection or try again later.

Your device's current network connection seems to be blocking Moonlight. Streaming over the Internet may not work while connected to this network.

The following network ports were blocked:
Your device\'s current network connection is blocking Moonlight. Streaming over the Internet may not work while connected to this network.
Computer is currently in a game. You must close the game before pairing.
Please enter the following PIN on the target PC:
If your host PC is running Sunshine, navigate to the Sunshine web UI to enter the PIN.
Unable to wake PC because there is no stored MAC address
It may take a few seconds for your PC to wake up. If it doesn\'t, make sure it\'s configured properly for Wake-On-LAN.
The ComputerManager service is not running. Please wait a few seconds or restart the app.
GFE returned an HTTP 404 error. Make sure your PC is running a supported GPU. Using remote desktop software can also cause this error. Try rebooting your machine or reinstalling GFE.
Moonlight has crashed due to an incompatibility with this device\'s video decoder. Try adjusting the streaming settings if the crashes continue.
Your device\'s video decoder continues to crash at your selected streaming settings. Your streaming settings have been reset to default.
USB access is prohibited by your device administrator. Check your Knox or MDM settings.
Your current launcher does not allow for creating pinned shortcuts.
Video decoder failed to initialize. Your device may not support the selected resolution or frame rate.
Your network connection isn\'t performing well. Reduce your video bitrate setting or try a faster connection.
Something went wrong on your host PC when starting the stream.\n\nMake sure you don\'t have any DRM-protected content open on your host PC. You can also try restarting your host PC.
The host PC reported a fatal video encoding error.\n\nTry disabling HDR mode, changing the streaming resolution, or changing your host PC\'s display resolution.
Check your firewall and port forwarding rules for port(s):
Warning: Your active network connection is metered!
Searching for host PCs on your local network…\n\n Ensure Sunshine is running on your host PC or GameStream is enabled in the GeForce Experience SHIELD settings.
Are you sure you want to delete this PC?
Slow connection to PC\nReduce your bitrate
Incoming frame rate from network: %1$.2f FPS
Frames dropped by your network connection: %1$.2f%%
Are you sure you want to quit the running app? All unsaved data will be lost.
Unable to connect to the specified computer. Make sure the required ports are allowed through the firewall.
Unable to resolve PC address. Make sure you didn\'t make a typo in the address.
You must enter an IP address
That address doesn\'t look right. You must use your router\'s public IP address for streaming over the Internet.
Increase to improve image clarity. Decrease for better performance on lower end devices and slower networks.

Native resolution and/or FPS may not be supported by the streaming server. You will probably need to configure a matching custom display mode for the host PC manually.

If you choose to create a custom resolution in NVIDIA Control Panel to match your screen settings, please ensure you have read and understood NVIDIA's warning regarding possible monitor damage, PC instability, and other potential problems.

We are not responsible for any problems resulting from creating a custom resolution on your PC.

It may be that your monitor does not support a necessary display configuration. If so, you may try to set up a virtual monitor. Finally, if your device or host PC does not support streaming at a specific resolution or refresh rate, you're out of luck unfortunately.
Increase for a smoother video stream. Decrease for better performance on lower end devices.
Increase for better image quality. Decrease to improve performance on slower connections.
Enable 5.1 or 7.1 surround sound for home-theater systems
Allows audio effects to function while streaming, but may increase audio latency
Unchecking this option forces a gamepad to always be present
Vibrates your device to emulate rumble if your gamepad does not support it
Amplify or reduce the vibration intensity on your device
Note: Some games can enforce a larger deadzone than what Moonlight is configured to use.
Enables a built-in USB driver for devices without native Xbox controller support
Use Moonlight\'s USB driver for all supported gamepads, even if native Xbox、PS4、PS5、NS Pro controller support is present
Long pressing the Start button will switch the gamepad into mouse mode
Switches the face buttons A/B and X/Y for gamepads and the on-screen controls
Forces gamepad touchpad input to control the host mouse, even when emulating a gamepad with a touchpad.
Allow use of gamepad motion sensors
Enables supported hosts to request motion sensor data when emulating a gamepad with motion sensors. Disabling may slightly reduce power and network usage if motion sensors are not being used in game.

Uses your device\'s built-in motion sensors if gamepad sensors are not supported by your connected gamepad or your Android version.\nNote: Enabling this option may cause your gamepad to appear as a PlayStation controller on the host.
Use the touchscreen as a trackpad
If enabled, the touchscreen acts like a trackpad. If disabled, the touchscreen directly controls the mouse cursor.
This can make mouse acceleration behave more naturally for remote desktop usage, but it is incompatible with many games.
Enable back and forward mouse buttons
Enabling this option may break right clicking on some buggy devices
Show virtual controller overlay on touchscreen
Vibrates your device to emulate rumble for the on-screen controls
Hide all virtual buttons except L3 and R3
Show the guide button on screen
Resets all on-screen controls to their default size and position
Are you sure you want to delete your saved on-screen controls layout?
Make the on-screen controls more/less transparent
Allows the stream to be viewed (but not controlled) while multitasking
Smaller box art in the app grid allows more apps to be visible on screen
Allow GFE to modify game settings for optimal streaming
Play audio from the computer and this device
Microphone uplink requires Android 10 or a device with an Opus encoder. Streaming will continue without microphone uplink.
Microphone permission was denied. Streaming will continue without microphone uplink.
Streaming at 90 or 120 FPS may reduce latency on high-end devices but can cause lag or instability on devices that can\'t support it
Lower display refresh rates can save power at the expense of some additional video latency
Disable on-screen connection warning messages while streaming
May reduce micro-stuttering on some devices, but can increase latency
Newer codecs can lower video bandwidth requirements if your device supports them. Codec selections may be ignored if not supported by the host software or GPU.
Stream HDR when the game and PC GPU support it. HDR requires a GPU with HEVC Main 10 encoding support.
This will cause loss of detail in light and dark areas if your device doesn\'t properly display full range video content.
Display real-time stream performance information while streaming
Display a latency information message after the stream ends
View instructions on how to set up your gaming PC for streaming
View tips for diagnosing and fixing common streaming issues
Gamepad type may be changed due to motion sensor emulation
Specify how to balance video latency and smoothness
Prefer smoothest video (may significantly increase latency)

This function is only used when an external physical keyboard is connected. Some systems have specific keyboard shortcuts. This situation will affect the streaming process and the relevant key commands cannot be transmitted to the target PC. 

Moonlight Assisi does not observe the text you enter, nor does it collect your password, credit card number, or any other information. 

Please pay attention to: Station B-Daily life in Assisi
Turn on controller keyboard and mouse mode
Turn off controller keyboard and mouse mode
Send Win (opens the Windows Start menu)
Send Win + X ~ U + U (shut down)
Send Win + G (Open Xbox Game Bar)
Use an analog stick to scroll
Select an analog stick to scroll when in mouse emulation mode

Warm reminder:
1. Enable the N card GeForce Shield service on the PC device or install Sunshine and enable the streaming service
 2. If it is the default port [47989], there is no need to enter it manually. The custom port needs to be spliced by yourself
 3. Support ipv4 and ipv6 addresses. For example:
 ipv4: 192.168.1.123
 ipv6: [fd00:6868:6868:0:fd6:e0ea:84d9:70ea]:47989
1. The controller test interface is available, but it is not recognized in the streaming game?

There is a high probability that the virtual controller driver ViGEmBus is not installed on the computer. Check whether there is any relevant error message on the sunshine homepage. ps: Click on the network disk resources, which will contain relevant installation files. \nOr the controller is recognized as a DS4 controller and some games are not suitable. You can solve the problem by changing the controller type to xbox360 in the sunshine background and entering the tab.
2. How to display the stream in full screen? How to play with the screen off?

Use a virtual display or HDMI spoofer to create a native display screen relative to the resolution. 
The HDMI spoofer needs to be created with the help of a graphics card driver. After the setting is completed, it needs to be set to the home screen. Sunshine captures the home screen by default (the default capture screen can be modified in the sunshine background) 
The information screen can be Win+P or System Settings-Display, select only display 1 or 2, or some sunshine versions have built-in related headless display settings in the background. 
Some sunshine versions come with a virtual display, such as the Apollo version. ps: Click on the network disk resources, which will contain relevant installation files.
Connect to your computer anytime, anywhere!
Thank you to every friend who supports and accompanies me
Long press to select the menu for more options
Click the refresh button to refresh the controller information\nUSB controller test settings-check the overwrite USB driver
Thank you for being with me all the way
This list is dedicated to every friend who supports Assisi, because of you, the project can continue to move forward.
The application configuration in the upper right corner takes effect! (Executed manually for each connection)
The application configuration in the upper right corner takes effect! (Executed manually for each connection)
After applying the configuration, the page is closed and you need to reopen the streaming page to take effect!
Codec selection may be ignored if the host software or graphics card does not support it.
Reopen the streaming page to take effect!
In HDR mode, the window brightness can be fully increased, and it is turned off by default.
Effective for Qualcomm 8Gen1 and above and MediaTek 9300 and below chip models!
Select a super-resolution output target and HDR is automatically handled by the render chain.
Reopen the streaming page to take effect!
It takes effect when using Sunshine Assisi and Razer Games, and is compatible with Apollo expansion mode.
Enabled on some systems (like ColorOS) to correctly set refresh rate/resolution.
Reopen the streaming page to take effect!
The device and PC sound simultaneously
Automatically connect back when the screen turns on
Effective immediately, keep the game menu closed when the screen is locked! ! !
Enter the code rate in mbps (only verify that it is not empty, do not fill in strange values)
Choose an appropriate frame rate. Abnormal frame rates may cause a black screen.
Enter width and height (save and use)

Assisi shortcut keys: AXIX prefix, such as AXIX0 (soft keyboard), AXIX1 (virtual keys), AXIX2 (virtual full keyboard), AXIX3 (virtual controller), AXIX4 (suspended ball), AXIX5 (performance information), AXIX6 (game menu)
The following option switches are saved to the configuration file
Game Menu Joystick Mouse Shortcut Keys
Controller gyroscope simulates right joystick Beta
Press the left trigger to activate
Convert streaming audio into vibration feedback, more suitable for explosions, impacts, and low-frequency scenes
Among them, the original DS5 wired driver takeover mode has special optimization.
Reduce vibration triggers caused by human voices, voice chat, and broadcast sounds
The options will be saved to disk and will always be valid!
Trackpad mode sensitivity (enabled by default with no switch)
Touchpad control sensitivity (enabled by default with no switch)
Gamepad keyboard and mouse mode Mouse pointer sensitivity
Mode switching: You need to turn on the virtual controller switch first~
Mode switching: You need to turn on the virtual key switch first~
If the button layout has appeared before, click the button in the upper right corner to refresh
Control default mode color (common to handles and buttons)
Control transparency (common to handles and buttons)
You can choose the download channel according to your habits.
The new version is ready. You can view the updated content and choose to download it.
Long press to select the menu for more options
Click the refresh button to refresh the controller information\nUSB controller test settings-check the overwrite USB driver

If you feel that the Seek control slide is not easy to use, you can choose to enter manually. \nIf the Seek sliding maximum value is exceeded, it may not be displayed but it will be effective during streaming~
Please enter a number. The decimal point can only be recognized up to x.5. If it exceeds, it will be rounded~
Forcibly set the video bitrate (override the sliding bitrate above)
(Experimental) Valid for Qualcomm 8Gen1 and above and MediaTek 9300 and below chip models.
Enable FSR super-resolution to 2K or 4K under GLES rendering.
Only takes effect when FSR overscore is enabled, the higher the value, the sharper the edges.
Compatible SDR mapping is more stable; native HDR direct output is experimental and requires the device to support BT2020 PQ.
Freely switch between horizontal and vertical screens
It may be helpful for folding screen mobile phones or tablets. Please DIY the resolution and screen position yourself.
The theme color of some pages is white
If you find that the right grip vibrates when you pull the left trigger, turn this option on.
Disable the default 13% controller trigger dead zone
After checking, the controller trigger dead zone is not restricted by Moonlight [except for some ASUS Gamepad devices].
You can choose a mouse mode, multi-touch needs to be used with sunshine~
By default, the cursor of an external physical mouse will be captured. This option can display the Android system cursor.
Turning on this option can achieve the same multi-touch operation windows system effect as surface. --> <!-- \nOnly supports sunshine 0.21 and above versions
Horizontal and vertical screens support separate configuration.
After turning it on, the virtual joystick cannot trigger L3 and R3.
Disable the center area of ​​the virtual joystick
Select a profile to override the default selected layout scheme. (landscape mode only)
Export the configuration file of the default selected layout scheme. (landscape mode only)
Display simplified version of performance information: network speed/latency/decoding/packet loss rate/FPS
Lite streamlined mode click to pop up shortcut options
Instead of the return key logic, the game shortcut menu pops up.
After turning it on, add resolution, HDR, decoder and other parameters.
Set the distance between the condensed performance information and the top margin of the screen. The default is 4dp.
Set the distance between the condensed performance information and the top margin of the screen. The default is 4dp.
Streamlined performance control distance from top

After turning it on, click the physical return button on the phone on the streaming interface to display relevant options! \nSoft keyboard, performance information, touch mode switching, sending special keys
Replace the previous dialog menu with a new UI style.
Left and right format 3D mode, for entertainment only! Requires an external handle to use!
After setting the resolution, exit the settings page and reopen it to take effect!

Add a custom resolution, divided by x number, strange resolutions may not take effect. 
Example: 1920x1080 
If it is a non-native resolution with notch screen, the notch area may not be filled by default. 
If the screen ratio is the same, you can manually set the stretched screen to fill the full screen.
To use with a custom resolution, make sure the streaming terminal you are using supports it and the PC terminal resolution is vertical.
If your JoyCon cannot be used or has problems recognizing the buttons, you can try turning this feature on. Compatible with Android 10 and above
Report controller battery status when available. \nIf you occasionally experience stuttering when using a touch screen/touchpad/stylus/mouse, turning this option off may be useful.
After turning it on, click to open the shortcut menu.
Adjust the height of the virtual full keyboard
After checking, the key combination mode is selected by default.
The streaming screen is displayed on the monitor, and controls such as virtual buttons and performance information are displayed on the phone screen.
Force the use of the vibration motor of the device itself
If you are not satisfied with the vibration effect of the connected handle itself, you can turn on this option! [Invalid for forced use of Moonlight’s built-in USB driver]
Virtual controllers use the device\'s own gyroscope

If you want the virtual controller to support gyroscope function, enable this option. \nYou may need to set the controller in the sunshine background to force it to be a ps4 controller. \nIt is recommended to turn off this option when connecting a physical controller.
Disable default special key commands (shortcut keys)
If you feel that the built-in instructions are of no use to you, you can disable them and use the ones you import.
May be useful for Quest Android 13 and above
The original one will be overwritten every time, so please make a backup.
Accessible keyboard mode displays captured key values
Open the accessible keyboard, enter keys on any interface of the Moonlight app, and the key values ​​will pop up for customizing the accessibility profile.
Display a layer of virtual special buttons on the touch screen. \nButton transparency is shared with the virtual controller in the options above.
Horizontal and vertical screens support separate configuration.
When you tap the screen button, it will trigger the phone\'s motor to vibrate. This option can also be used for the virtual controller buttons.
Select a profile to override the default selected layout scheme. (landscape mode only)
Export the configuration file of the default selected layout scheme. (landscape mode only)
Convert streaming audio into vibration feedback, more suitable for explosions, impacts, and low-frequency scenes
Choose to output to your mobile phone or to a connected controller
Adjust the audio vibration intensity of your phone or controller.
Reduce vibration triggers caused by human voices, voice chat, and broadcast sounds
When the output target is a controller, whether to retain the game\'s original controller vibration. Off by default.
Backup and restore data [Pay attention to data security]
Export a sqlite database file in db format
Export the certificate file for network requests
Export a certificate file in crt format
Export the key file of the network request
Export a verification file in key format
Selecting the db database file will overwrite and update the original computer list, and you need to re-open the APP to take effect.
Import the certificate file requested by the network
Import a certificate file in crt format
Import the key file of the network request
Import a verification file in key format
If unchecked, the default background will be used. Supported by Android 10 or above.

Select a picture and rotate the screen to take effect~\nThe fault tolerance rate is not very high, so the size and type of the picture should not be too large, be careful of crash~\nIf it crashes, clearing the data can solve it~
Whether to customize the background image to perform Gaussian blur processing, supported by Android 12 or above.
Set the text on the left side of the home screen
Set the text on the left side of the home screen
Turn on this function and click the icon to directly enter the streaming interface without clicking on the pop-up menu option.
Connect to your computer anytime, anywhere!
Thank you to every friend who supports and accompanies me
Long press to select the menu for more options
Click the refresh button to refresh the controller information\nUSB controller test settings-check the overwrite USB driver
Thank you for being with me all the way
This list is dedicated to every friend who supports Assisi, because of you, the project can continue to move forward.
The application configuration in the upper right corner takes effect! (Executed manually for each connection)
The following functions may require reconnecting the controller to take effect!
The following functions need to reopen the streaming page to take effect!
The application configuration in the upper right corner takes effect! (Executed manually for each connection)
After applying the configuration, the page is closed and you need to reopen the streaming page to take effect!
Codec selection may be ignored if the host software or graphics card does not support it.
Reopen the streaming page to take effect!
In HDR mode, the window brightness can be fully increased, and it is turned off by default.
Effective for Qualcomm 8Gen1 and above and MediaTek 9300 and below chip models!
Select a super-resolution output target and HDR is automatically handled by the render chain.
Reopen the streaming page to take effect!
It takes effect when using Sunshine Assisi and Razer Games, and is compatible with Apollo expansion mode.
Enabled on some systems (like ColorOS) to correctly set refresh rate/resolution.
Reopen the streaming page to take effect!
The device and PC sound simultaneously
Automatically connect back when the screen turns on
Effective immediately, keep the game menu closed when the screen is locked! ! !
Enter the code rate in mbps (only verify that it is not empty, do not fill in strange values)
Choose an appropriate frame rate. Abnormal frame rates may cause a black screen.
Enter width and height (save and use)

Assisi shortcut keys: AXIX prefix, such as AXIX0 (soft keyboard), AXIX1 (virtual keys), AXIX2 (virtual full keyboard), AXIX3 (virtual controller), AXIX4 (suspended ball), AXIX5 (performance information), AXIX6 (game menu)
The following option switches are saved to the configuration file
Game Menu Joystick Mouse Shortcut Keys
Controller gyroscope simulates right joystick Beta
Press the left trigger to activate
Convert streaming audio into vibration feedback, more suitable for explosions, impacts, and low-frequency scenes
Among them, the original DS5 wired driver takeover mode has special optimization.
Reduce vibration triggers caused by human voices, voice chat, and broadcast sounds
The options will be saved to disk and will always be valid!
Trackpad mode sensitivity (enabled by default with no switch)
Touchpad control sensitivity (enabled by default with no switch)
Gamepad keyboard and mouse mode Mouse pointer sensitivity

Mode switching: You need to turn on the virtual key switch first~
If the button layout has appeared before, click the button in the upper right corner to refresh

You can choose the download channel according to your habits.
The new version is ready. You can view the updated content and choose to download it.

If you feel that the Seek control slide is not easy to use, you can choose to enter manually. \nIf the Seek sliding maximum value is exceeded, it may not be displayed but it will be effective during streaming~
Please enter a number. The decimal point can only be recognized up to x.5. If it exceeds, it will be rounded~
Forcibly set the video bitrate (override the sliding bitrate above)
(Experimental) Valid for Qualcomm 8Gen1 and above and MediaTek 9300 and below chip models.
Enable FSR super-resolution to 2K or 4K under GLES rendering.
Only takes effect when FSR overscore is enabled, the higher the value, the sharper the edges.
Compatible SDR mapping is more stable; native HDR direct output is experimental and requires the device to support BT2020 PQ.
Freely switch between horizontal and vertical screens
It may be helpful for folding screen mobile phones or tablets. Please DIY the resolution and screen position yourself.
The theme color of some pages is white
If you find that the right grip vibrates when you pull the left trigger, turn this option on.
Disable the default 13% controller trigger dead zone
After checking, the controller trigger dead zone is not restricted by Moonlight [except for some ASUS Gamepad devices].
You can choose a mouse mode, multi-touch needs to be used with sunshine~
By default, the cursor of an external physical mouse will be captured. This option can display the Android system cursor.
Turning on this option can achieve the same multi-touch operation windows system effect as surface. --> <!-- \nOnly supports sunshine 0.21 and above versions
Horizontal and vertical screens support separate configuration.
After turning it on, the virtual joystick cannot trigger L3 and R3.
Disable the center area of ​​the virtual joystick
Select a profile to override the default selected layout scheme. (landscape mode only)
Export the configuration file of the default selected layout scheme. (landscape mode only)
Display simplified version of performance information: network speed/latency/decoding/packet loss rate/FPS
Lite streamlined mode click to pop up shortcut options
Instead of the return key logic, the game shortcut menu pops up.
After turning it on, add resolution, HDR, decoder and other parameters.
Set the distance between the condensed performance information and the top margin of the screen. The default is 4dp.
Set the distance between the condensed performance information and the top margin of the screen. The default is 4dp.
Streamlined performance control distance from top

After turning it on, click the physical return button on the phone on the streaming interface to display relevant options! \nSoft keyboard, performance information, touch mode switching, sending special keys
Replace the previous dialog menu with a new UI style.
Left and right format 3D mode, for entertainment only! Requires an external handle to use!
After setting the resolution, exit the settings page and reopen it to take effect!

Add a custom resolution, divided by x number, strange resolutions may not take effect. 
Example: 1920x1080 
If it is a non-native resolution with notch screen, the notch area may not be filled by default. 
If the screen ratio is the same, you can manually set the stretched screen to fill the full screen.
To use with a custom resolution, make sure the streaming terminal you are using supports it and the PC terminal resolution is vertical.
If your JoyCon cannot be used or has problems recognizing the buttons, you can try turning this feature on. Compatible with Android 10 and above
Report controller battery status when available. \nIf you occasionally experience stuttering when using a touch screen/touchpad/stylus/mouse, turning this option off may be useful.
After turning it on, click to open the shortcut menu.
Adjust the height of the virtual full keyboard
After checking, the key combination mode is selected by default.
The streaming screen is displayed on the monitor, and controls such as virtual buttons and performance information are displayed on the phone screen.
Force the use of the vibration motor of the device itself
If you are not satisfied with the vibration effect of the connected handle itself, you can turn on this option! [Invalid for forced use of Moonlight’s built-in USB driver]
Virtual controllers use the device\'s own gyroscope

If you want the virtual controller to support gyroscope function, enable this option. \nYou may need to set the controller in the sunshine background to force it to be a ps4 controller. \nIt is recommended to turn off this option when connecting a physical controller.
Disable default special key commands (shortcut keys)
If you feel that the built-in instructions are of no use to you, you can disable them and use the ones you import.
May be useful for Quest Android 13 and above
The original one will be overwritten every time, so please make a backup.
Accessible keyboard mode displays captured key values
Open the accessible keyboard, enter keys on any interface of the Moonlight app, and the key values ​​will pop up for customizing the accessibility profile.
Display a layer of virtual special buttons on the touch screen. \nButton transparency is shared with the virtual controller in the options above.
Horizontal and vertical screens support separate configuration.
When you tap the screen button, it will trigger the phone\'s motor to vibrate. This option can also be used for the virtual controller buttons.
Select a profile to override the default selected layout scheme. (landscape mode only)
Export the configuration file of the default selected layout scheme. (landscape mode only)
Convert streaming audio into vibration feedback, more suitable for explosions, impacts, and low-frequency scenes
Choose to output to your mobile phone or to a connected controller
Adjust the audio vibration intensity of your phone or controller.
Reduce vibration triggers caused by human voices, voice chat, and broadcast sounds
When the output target is a controller, whether to retain the game\'s original controller vibration. Off by default.
Backup and restore data [Pay attention to data security]
Export a sqlite database file in db format

Export a certificate file in crt format
Export the key file of the network request
Export a verification file in key format
Selecting the db database file will overwrite and update the original computer list, and you need to re-open the APP to take effect.
Import the certificate file requested by the network
Import a certificate file in crt format
Import the key file of the network request
Import a verification file in key format
If unchecked, the default background will be used. Supported by Android 10 or above.

Select a picture and rotate the screen to take effect~\nThe fault tolerance rate is not very high, so the size and type of the picture should not be too large, be careful of crash~\nIf it crashes, clearing the data can solve it~
Whether to customize the background image to perform Gaussian blur processing, supported by Android 12 or above.
Set the text on the left side of the home screen
Set the text on the left side of the home screen
Turn on this function and click the icon to directly enter the streaming interface without clicking on the pop-up menu option.
